resources.string: You have made too many accounts. Please wait before making more.
Please login to complete the pending transaction. If this problem persists contact our staff at discord.gg/finobe
Your birthday appears to be incorrect.
We are sorry, you cannot make purchases at this time. If this problem persists contact our staff at discord.gg/finobe
You are not able to make purchases. Check your parental control settings and try again later.
Cannot join this game because it has ended.
Cannot join this game because it is full.
The game did not end correctly. You may need a Software Update. See the Settings section About Device.
Your email address appears to be invalid.
One or more of the fields are incorrect or empty.
Not all required fields are filled
There was an error starting this game.
You already have pending transactions, please try again after some time. You may need to restart your device. If this problem persists contact our staff at discord.gg/finobe
Project Hexagon is not affiliated with Roblox Corporation. Contact us at discord.gg/finobe (Port made by SkylerClock)
Do you want to log out?
"We're sorry, this place uses too many parts for your device"
Your user account has issues, please try logging in using Safari or any other browser
No birthday specified, please select a birthday.
No gender specified, please select a gender.
No password specified, please enter a password.
No username was entered, please enter a username.
"Password was not verified, please enter password in 'Verify' field."
Passwords do not match. Please retype your password.
Password must contain 6-20 characters with at least 2 numbers.
Purchase successful, it may take up to 5 minutes to be reflected in your account
We would really appreciate you rating Hexagon on the Play store.
If you enjoy using Hexagon, would you please rate it? It wont take more than a minute. If you are having issues or problems, please contact us at discord.gg/finobe.
Hexagon Studio connection created, waiting for setup...
Type your Rbx Dev Code (should be 4 numbers) from Hexagon Studio to pair this device.
Please press connect button when you have a server running on Hexagon Studio.
A new version of %s is available in the App Store. We recommend installing it before continuing.
Your version of %s is out of date and will not work properly. Please upgrade immediately.
Session Expired, Please logout and log back in to do the purchase

"By tapping 'Sign up' above, you are agreeing to our <a href='https://hexagon.pw/legal/terms'>Terms of Service</a> and <a href='https://hexagon.pw/legal/terms'>Privacy Policy</a>. We will not share your information with third parties."
"By tapping 'Sign up' above, you are agreeing to our Terms of Service, Licensing Agreement, and Privacy Policy. We will not share your information with third parties."
Too many attempts - please try after 5 minutes
Your transaction is delayed. We are still processing your transaction, it may take some more time.
Purchase failed, please contact our staff at discord.gg/finobe
Sorry, your device does not meet the minimum requirements to play games.
Warning: Your device may not be powerful enough to play games smoothly.
Your version of Hexagon is out of date and will not work properly. Taking you to Google Play Store for Upgrade.
Hexagon User %s needs to login to complete the pending transaction before you can buy. You may need to restart your device. If this problem persists contact our staff at discord.gg/finobe
This username is not allowed, please try another.
This username is already taken! Try \"%s\" instead!
Username is too long. Please select a name that is 3-20 alphanumeric characters.
Username is too short. Please select a name that is 3-20 alphanumeric characters.
This password does not match the original password you entered.
The verify password does not match the password.
"Please wait for some time before making Builder's Club purchase"
Please wait for some time before making Catalog purchase
Please wait for some time before making Robux purchase
"We're sorry, this place may not play well on your device because:"
This place has %d parts (%d is recommended)
Cannot start game because you are not connected via WiFi (you can change this setting in the Settings App)
You are currently signed in as a guest
Create an account or sign in to access this feature.
An application requires Google Play Services to be enabled.
An application requires installation of Google Play Services.
An application requires an update for Google Play Services.
An application attempted to use a bad version of Google Play Services.
"This app won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"This app won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your phone."
"This app won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your tablet."
The specified account does not exist on this device. Please choose a different account.
A data connection is required to connect to Google Play services.
Unknown issue with Google Play services.
The date on the device appears to be incorrect. Please check the date on the device.
Google Play services, which some of your applications rely on, is not supported by your device. Please contact the manufacturer for assistance.
"This app won't run unless you update Google Play services."
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
Did not pair with Studio, did you put in the right code?
Could not find Hexagon Studio. Please make sure you are on the same network as Hexagon studio.
